descriptions: Added server-side enforcement of the job blacklist across all 12 crime modules — blacklisted jobs are re-checked on the server before any loot/reward is granted, preventing client-side bypasses.
Closed the brief window right after a player spawns before their config syncs by ensuring server-side checks always run.
Job blacklist matching is now case-insensitive — Police, police, and ' police ' all match correctly. Names are trimmed and lower-cased on both client and server.
Added config-sync wait to mugging, parcels, pickpocketing, tire slash, and pedal brick — all 12 modules now wait properly so the blacklist applies the moment a module becomes usable.
Cash register lockpick minigame now locks the player in place during the lockpick, matching mailbox robbery behaviour. Cancelling fails the robbery and releases them cleanly.
Cash register break-in now plays a full-body looping animation instead of the upper-body-only variant.
Fixed the editor not clearing a module's blacklisted-jobs list when emptied and saved — it now clears properly.
